The '''New Republic Second Fleet''' was a major [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] unit of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|Defense Fleet]]. Formed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Second Fleet was one of the four original fleets of the New Republic Navy that fought in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends#The advance of the New Republic (4-6 ABY)|New Republic liberation campaign]] up to the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|capture of Coruscant]].<ref name="TEGTW" />

The Second Fleet operated out of the New Republic redoubt in the [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]]. After a successful initial campaign in 4 ABY, the Second Fleet suffered a serious defeat after an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Battle of the Hast Shipyards|raid]] on the [[Hast Shipyards]], destroying dozens of ships and forcing a halt in operations in the galactic north.<ref name="TEGTW" />

From [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the Second Fleet became a major New Republic defensive command based at [[Elom (planet)/Legends|Elom]] in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Borderland Regions]].<ref name="TEGTW" /> It served as a rapid reaction fleet during the [[Thrawn campaign]].<ref name="TEA" />

Shortly before the [[Yevethan Purge|Yevethan Great Purge]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the Second Fleet rotated back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for home guard duty after patrolling [[Thunder Alley]] for a long while.<ref name="BtS">''[[Before the Storm]]''</ref>

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], prior to the [[Battle of Fondor]] the Second Fleet was active near [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].<ref name="JE" /> It later became the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]].
